calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-08-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday Jan. 8, 2015 in Department 525:
Patricia Gray Respondent/Plaintiff appears in Propria Persona.
NO APPEARANCE by Appellant/Defendant IN AND OUT PLUMBING & CONSTRUCTION, INC.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Patricia Gray is sworn.

Clerk informs the Court that Appellant/Defendant has called this morning that owner, Anthony Abbas of IN & OUT has an emergency and cannot come to this hearing.
Respondent/Plaintiff Patricia Grany responds to questions from Judge Commins and testifies on her own behalf.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge Pro Tempore: David H.S. Commins; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-30-2014 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-11-2014 Continued To Oct-30-14 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 506
